title: Donald Trump invites Xi Jinping to his inauguration - report
description: The inauguration is due to take place in Washington on 21 January (NZ time).
keywords: Radio New Zealand, RNZ, Public Radio, News, Current Affairs, Audio, Podcasts
snippet:
Photo: AFP

US President-elect Donald Trump has invited Chinese President Xi Jinping to attend his inauguration next month, CBS News reported on Wednesday, citi...
